author: Gershon Bialer
name: Emergent Weight Symmetry in QO Projections + Learnable SymMix
blurb: Layers 6-8 O projections converge to exact symmetry (W=W^T, sym_energy=0.999998) during training. SymMix (W + tanh(beta)*W^T with learnable beta) is loss-neutral. Research finding on weight structure in parameter-constrained transformers.
